per_case.golden_answer: The Foundations Law 2018 and the Trust Law 2018 are the 2018 laws in the corpus whose schedules include provisions that refer to arbitration-related matters.

The 2018 laws in the corpus made by the Ruler of Dubai include the Companies Law 2018, the Common Reporting Standard Law 2018, the Foundations Law 2018, the Operating Law 2018, the Real Property Law 2018, and the Trust Law 2018.
per_case.our_answer:
1. in the form now attached the DIFC Laws Amendment Law 2018 (cite: fe81efddb24f01f4455fc6b16fc0867615e840b0d36e7abfd1441e5c2eaed92d:1:anchor:1e2b6cab)

per_case.golden_answer: The Dematerialised Investments Regulations cite the Companies Law and the Personal Property Law as conferring powers for the regulations dealing with uncertificated investments and company structure.

per_case.golden_answer: The Court dismissed the application for a default costs certificate and ordered the Claimant to bear its own costs of the application.
per_case.our_answer: The Application is dismissed (cite: 443e04bc1a78940b3fcd5438d24b6c5f182a276d354a3108e738b193675de032:0:0:7e3612a4). The Claimant shall bear its own costs of the Application (cite: 443e04bc1a78940b3fcd5438d24b6c5f182a276d354a3108e738b193675de032:0:0:7e3612a4).

per_case.golden_answer: Law No. 1 of 2025 broadens Article 6(3)(b) so the Data Protection Law also applies to processing of Personal Data in the DIFC by a Controller or Processor, including Sub-processors, where the processing forms part of stable arrangements and is not merely occasional.
per_case.our_answer: Article 6(3) of the Data Protection Law 2020, as amended by Law No. 1 of 2025, clarifies that the law applies to Processing of Personal Data in the DIFC by a Controller or Processor (or their Sub-processors), regardless of place of incorporation, as part of stable arrangements and not on an occasional basis, and specifies that Processing “in the DIFC” occurs when the means or personnel used are physically located in the DIFC (cite: ef59bbc482cdca0268be35906d6274916740cb92a17c5d5d914b0f09807154f7:3:0:2ae7fd31). This modifies the original scope by emphasizing stable arrangements and clarifying the physical presence requirement for Processing in the DIFC (cite: ef59bbc482cdca0268be35906d6274916740cb92a17c5d5d914b0f09807154f7:3:0:2ae7fd31).

per_case.golden_answer: The Leasing Law 2020 and the Trust Law 2018 are both administered by the DIFCA.
per_case.our_answer: DIFCA administers Leasing Law 2020 and any Regulations made under it (cite: 8c6d34f8833e88c664c99576d875f0d1bcab6bd6360e9c6fe6dec3f50f9bde01:3:1:98026e07)

per_case.golden_answer: General Partnership Law 2004 and Limited Liability Partnership Law 2004.
Law No. 16 of 2011 superseded Articles 2, 4, 5 and 7 of Law No. 12 of 2004; the superseded Article 4 dealt with the duties and powers of the Chief Justice of the Courts.
per_case.our_answer: Articles 2, 4, 5, and 7 of Law No. 12 of 2004 are explicitly superseded by Law No. 16 of 2011 (Art. 1). Article 4 of Law No. 12 of 2004, which was superseded, primarily addressed the duties and powers of the Chief Justice of the Courts, including general supervision and specific administrative functions (Art. 4) (cite: be59024d9c82dbc4a8b716e94bd1169387066998e415fb598e677eb9ad104c29:0:1:ff56313c) (cite: 2367e45430240e0210f1c54962e7e3a96b6b0908c56e01eb77ced99e114d61be:0:0:fb95e1d8) (cite: 2367e45430240e0210f1c54962e7e3a96b6b0908c56e01eb77ced99e114d61be:6:0:5fd9479e) (cite: 2367e45430240e0210f1c54962e7e3a96b6b0908c56e01eb77ced99e114d61be:1:2:f2ce4b20).

The Board of Directors of the DIFCA has authority to make the Dematerialised Investments Regulations, under powers conferred by Article 116 of the Companies Law and Article 43 of the Personal Property Law.
per_case.our_answer: The Board of Directors of the DIFCA has the authority to make the Dematerialised Investments Regulations (DIR) under Article 116 of the Companies Law and Article 43 of the Personal Property Law. These laws are expressly cited as conferring the necessary powers for these regulations (cite: 20be16a68c4d24768f569bcde5ddb29437204006c0c4262296c350b365672cd1:2:0:62069597).

per_case.golden_answer: Both the DIFC Laws Amendment Law No. 3 of 2024 and the Law of Security Law No. 4 of 2024 come into force on the fifth business day after enactment.
per_case.our_answer: The common commencement rule for the DIFC Law Amendment Law 2024 and the Law of Security Law 2024 is Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: fb4addc95a4cf4e622a048ba729de434400e523f293197cb979514485c067b1b:0:0:7a786bb5, 77ed6765ad5556f347f1e9fdfb0ce72dba0451713359f73aae3fbc00b35ede32:0:0:da4023eb)
